title: Azure OpenAI Retired 2025 Legacy And Preview Model IDs
summary: Microsoft Learn lists Azure OpenAI 2025 retirements for legacy and preview model IDs including davinci-002, DALL-E 2, GPT-35 Turbo variants, GPT-4 snapshots, GPT-4.5 preview, GPT-4o realtime preview, and o1-preview.

evidence_refs.selector: Azure OpenAI retired models table; 2025 retirement rows
evidence_refs.license_note: Official Microsoft Learn page reviewed for factual metadata; no provider prose copied.

impacts.recommended_action: Audit Azure OpenAI deployments, gateway allowlists, and agent model routes for retired 2025 model IDs before replaying old examples or restoring old fallbacks.
Refresh Azure OpenAI migration notes, test fixtures, and model-selection defaults to use the listed replacement families where applicable.

detail.migration_notes: The source table contains per-row 2025 retirement dates from January 27 through July 28. APW uses the earliest retirement date as the event date and migration deadline for this grouped historical event.

limitations: Historical reviewed event; APW did not observe the original 2025 retirements in real time.
This event summarizes selected 2025 Azure OpenAI retirement rows and does not reproduce the full provider table.
Some affected model IDs have later 2025 retirement dates; consumers should check the official table for model-specific deadlines and replacements.
